abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.description: When targeted by enemy Magical Action, enemy loses any suit from Magical Skill.

abilities.name: Magical Shielding
abilities.description: Friendly within a6 reduce damage by 1 (minimum 0).

abilities.name: Ritualistic Caster
abilities.description: May declare any Triggers including same Trigger multiple times. Each suit pays for single Trigger.

abilities.name: The Ritual Has Begun
abilities.description: Peon/Minion within a6 may assist ritual (2 AP for +rtcm to Magical). Academic treat as (1).

actions: (2) Elemental Bolt (Sorcery/Intellect) | AV: 7t (14t) | TN: 14t | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Tome Fire: Burning +1. Tome Ice: Slow. Tome Electric: Ignores Armor. Tome Wind: Push 2 yards.
(2) Teleport (Prestidigitation/Intellect) | AV: 6m (13m) | TN: 10m | Rg: 10 | Resist: Wp | Target instantly teleported to safe location in range.
system.notes: Graduates of Oxford University of Metaphysical Studies. Smuggled by Arcanists. Ritualistic casting chains Triggers. Grow exponentially dangerous together.
